layout.alignment: Left-aligned content, asymmetric balances. No center-everything.

surfaces.floating_panel: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] rounded-2xl
surfaces.hover_state: transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-zinc-700 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-black/50

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-50 text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors font-medium rounded-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-700 transition-colors font-medium border border-zinc-700 rounded-lg
buttons.ai_action: bg-blue-600/10 text-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-600/20 border border-blue-500/20 transition-colors rounded-lg

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight, strictly sized.

image_urls.description: Abstract striking neon light on dark backdrop for AI dashboard login or hero banner.
Palantir company logo for job card or match UI.
LinkedIn logo for profile import or job tracking.
NVIDIA logo for target tech company job card.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Mode setup using Obsidian Black (#0A0A0B) as base.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or generic sans fonts. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for Headings, 'Manrope' for Body, and 'JetBrains Mono' for numbers, XP, and AI match scores.
Banned: Purple or Teal gradients. Use precise, functional accents: Electric Azure for AI insights, Emerald for match scores, and Ember Orange for streaks.
Use 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard to achieve a dense, professional OS feel rather than generic, blocky cards.
Floating panels (AI Coach Chat, Job Details overlay) MUST use glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-white/10).
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='job-apply-button').
Do not use Shadcn default card styling blindly. Override to remove shadows on base cards, keeping 1px subtle zinc-800 borders, applying shadows only on floating panels.
Do NOT use dummy image URLs. Only use the provided media URLs for logos and backgrounds.
For gamification elements (Streak, XP), use JetBrains Mono font with the specified gamification colors, maintaining a sophisticated, non-childish design.
